headline: Product-minded TypeScript and React engineer building practical software across the stack.
summary: I love to code, solve problems, and build. I'm a Typescript-React enjoyer and a stan for the new school ecosystem around it.

More of a luthier than a lumberjack when it comes to coding, but never afraid to get my hands dirty. I do believe agentic coding is the present, but the deep human understanding of a problem space and the World surrounding it is irreplaceable.
A little bit addicted to coffee and online chess. Started learning math and comp-sci again. I want to know how the sausage is made, from first principles.
experienceHighlights: Working across startups and larger organizations

experience.title: Senior Student of Craft
experience.description: I want to know how the sausage is made, from first principles.

experience.title: Co-Founder
experience.description: A passion project with two friends; improveme.io is a webapp to do ad-hoc, project-based peer feedback. At one point we even had more than zero (~300) users! :) It was a great opportunity to learn the T3 stack. Now it is a great project to experiment and build with agentic workflows and AI solutions.

experience.title: Senior Frontend Developer
experience.description: I was part of the “Foundations” team Built features around search, user management and data insights Introduced a new design system and component library Lead modularization effort on the front-end

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
experience.description: As a solo dev I was responsible for the “Replay App”, a video viewing and annotating platform Built a custom video player with live streaming, offline playback, and an interactive annotation tool Rearchitected and rebuilt existing parts of the platform

experience.title: Frontend Developer
experience.description: Worked on decoupling the “admin” interface from a PHP monolith I was the product owner responsible for the day-to-day operation and rituals of a cross-functional team of 6

experience.title: Frontend Developer
experience.description: Worked mostly on the frontend and a bit on the backend of a factoring service for an early-stage fintech startup Dabbled in being the product owner for a small team of 3

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Provided integration, automation, and tooling for all of Prezi’s go-to-market teams.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
experience.description: I was part of the “Chain Bridge” team Worked on integration, automation, and tooling for all of Prezi’s go-to-market teams Worked on licensing and payment systems

experience.title: Support Specialist
experience.description: "Hi, this is Michael from Prezi, how can I help you?" :) I was doing night shift billing, then T2 tech support. During the day, I was learning how to code.
